title: Frequency Tagging of Syntactic Structure or Lexical Properties

funding_references.award_title: International Laboratory for Social Neuroscience of the Institute for Cognitive Neuroscience HSE

description: This dataset comprises magnetoencephalographic (MEG) recordings investigating the neural mechanisms of syntactic structure and lexical property processing through frequency tagging methodology. The study employs frequency-tagging techniques to isolate neural responses to linguistic features, providing insights into the temporal dynamics of language comprehension at the neural level.
methods_description: Data were collected using magnetoencephalographic (MEG) recording techniques with frequency tagging paradigms to investigate syntactic and lexical processing. The dataset is organized according to BIDS standards for electrophysiological data.
